name: nable
description: Local-first FinOps for Claude. Ask what's driving your AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, and SaaS bill, right where you work.

plugins.name: nable
plugins.description: Local-first FinOps copilot. 180+ tools for cost queries, anomaly detection, rightsizing, and PRs across AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, and SaaS. Includes a /nable:connect command. Credentials stay on your machine.
